faq.title: Have Questions?
faq.subtitle: Check our FAQ
faq.q1: What does this optimizer actually do?
faq.a1: It intelligently tweaks system-level settings, closes unnecessary background processes, and optimizes your game's CPU/GPU scheduling to deliver smoother FPS, lower latency, and reduced stuttering—far beyond what basic cleaners or Windows tweaks can offer.
faq.q2: Will this work on every game?
faq.a2: Yes, the optimizer is designed to work at the system level, meaning any application recognized as a game will benefit from the resource prioritization.
faq.q3:
What's the difference between this and just using Windows
Game Mode?
faq.a3: While Windows Game Mode provides basic priority, our optimizer deep-cleans RAM, disables specific telemetry services, and uses proprietary scheduling algorithms that Windows ignores.

builtToBoost.description: Boost FPS and responsiveness with IQ Optimizer, no complicated setup required.

intro.title: What It Does & How It Helps
intro.p1: IQ Optimizer upgrades your system for better in-game performance on any PC, from low-end laptops to high-end gaming setups. It boosts FPS, reduces lag, and improves responsiveness by stopping unnecessary background tasks and fine-tuning registry values to maximize system efficiency.
intro.p2: Just pick a plan (Free or Premium), install, and optimize in one click. No complex setup. No confusion, just smoother, faster gameplay.
